summary: Copy shared entrypoint scripts to `/entrypoint.sh` (outside `/app`) in `backend/Dockerfile` — not to `./entrypoint.sh` or `/app/entrypoint.sh`. The `docker-compose.override.yml` local-dev bind-mount `./backend:/app:ro` shadows the entire `/app` directory, so any file placed inside `/app` is invisible at runtime in dev; files outside `/app` are unaffected.
